description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build sakura that runs on push and pull request events for master, feature/*, and release/* branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on Windows 2019 and 2022 with Debug and Release configurations for Win32 and x64 platforms. It checks out the code, sets up MSBuild, and then runs a series of steps including setting environment variables, building with MSBuild, running unit tests, installing Locale Emulator, building HTML Help, updating Inno Setup, building an installer, and uploading various artifacts.
